result.stdout:
Description:
  SQLFactory Code Generator - Generate entity classes from database schema

Usage:
  sqlfactory-codegen [options]

Options:
  -c, --connection <connection> (REQUIRED)  Database connection string
  -p, --provider <provider>                 Database provider (sqlserver, postgresql, mysql, sqlite) [default: sqlserver]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>               Namespace for generated classes [default: MyApp.Entities]
  -o, --output <output>                     Output directory for generated files [default: ./Generated]
  -t, --tables <tables>                     Specific tables to generate (leave empty for all)
  --version                                 Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information
